description: Manual motive overrides layered on top of mathematical league-table stakes. These are used only when a motive cannot be inferred from points, games remaining, rank, goal difference, and qualification cutoffs.

Man United.note: Champions League qualification is effectively secured; softer motivation remains through Bruno Fernandes chasing the single-season assist record.

playerMotives.note: Assist-record chase based on imported player stats/screenshots showing a high assist total.

Barcelona.note: La Liga title secured; rotation and intensity risk should reduce confidence on player props and exact score lines.

Paris SG.note: Ligue 1 title secured; rotation and European-final preparation risk should reduce confidence on player props and exact score lines.

Bayern Munich.note: Bundesliga title secured; rotation risk should reduce confidence on player props and exact score lines.
